--- Bounded workspace product architecture evidence (multi-domain) ---
Scenario: field-service (Field Service App)
Workspace: C:/Users/Richa/Desktop/DevPulse-V2/.generated-builder-workspaces/rbep-fleet-management-web-v1
Contract: build-ready-idea-1
Domain: Field service job tracker with technician assignment and status filters
Entity Job: primary record in client state
Behaviours: Create job, Technician assignment, Job status update, Scheduled/completed filter, Delete job, Active job count
Frontend: React + Vite SPA with Inventory feature route
Verification: UVL 7/7; runtime 9/9
Known limitations:
- Fleet profile uses inventory universal shell — jobs may map to inventory-item records
- Technician assignment verified via honest source pattern checks
- No GPS routing or dispatch integrations in MVP
